facts_repo_architecture_349315267165.content: The Kody engine source lives in a separate repo (aharonyaircohen/Kody-ADE-Engine), while the test runner/validation logic is in this repo — source-level changes require working across both.

conventions_pipeline_conventions_3493166.content: E2E test suites (like P3T19) are named with pipeline prefixes and run as triggered Kody pipeline stages rather than as standard unit tests.
